value.reason: The cited page is explicitly about "Background Tasks & Subagents" in the Antigravity CLI, directly documenting the capability of spawning focused sub-agents to handle parts of a task. The label "Subagents" matches the provider's own terminology used throughout the page. The description accurately reflects the page's content: the primary agent delegates long-running operations to parallel autonomous Subagents via a multi-threaded async architecture, and progress is monitored via an interactive panel (/agents) that tracks background agents in real time. No claims in the description are invented or contradicted by the page.
